program: AMP2 Supply and supplier execution program

scenarios.prompt: Open a product supplier with linked purchase orders.
expected: AMP2 panel loads a generated supplier performance brief from order analytics.
Buyer can edit and mark the supplier execution plan reviewed.
Supplier record persists the reviewed brief, gap plan, review status, and note.
Assistant audit records the supplier execution review.

scenarios.prompt: Use a supplier with approved/sent/open POs or overdue requested delivery dates.
expected: Panel surfaces PO follow-up evidence with links to order rows.
Buyer edits a supplier follow-up message.
Queue follow-up creates an AssistantActionQueueItem with copyable message payload.
Supplier execution status changes to FOLLOW_UP_QUEUED.

scenarios.prompt: Use a supplier with one or more incomplete onboarding tasks.
expected: Panel generates an onboarding gap plan from open tasks.
Buyer creates a new onboarding task from the plan.
Buyer can close the supplier gap after review.
Task creation and close/review decisions are logged in assistant audit.
